rationale.R1.7: Delegation is exclusively 'check the citations' — load-bearing on reference accuracy, coverage, and attribution. The artifact contains only one named citation (Eyring et al., 2016 for CMIP6 projections) and multiple uncited empirical claims: the 20–40% adoption-lag figure, the American Community Survey demographic calibration, and the generative-agent 'interactive simulacra' architecture. All of these fall squarely within citation and scholarship verification.
